Documentation développeur
Dependencies.cs
1 using System;
2 using System.Collections.Generic;
3 
4 namespace XmlToCMake
5 {
6  public class Dependencies
7  {
8  public Dependencies ()
9  {
10  }
11 
12  public static List<string> Failed (Directory directory, PackageList package_list)
13  {
14  string[] dependencies = { };
15 
16  var failed_dependencies = new List<string> ();
17 
18  if (directory.depend == null) {
19  return failed_dependencies;
20  }
21 
22  if (directory.depend != null) {
23  String depend_attribute = directory.depend;
24  dependencies = depend_attribute.Split (new char[] { ' ', ',' }, StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries);
25  }
26 
27  foreach (string dep in dependencies) {
28  string true_dep = PackageList.convertTagToPkglistName(dep);
29  bool test_dep = true;
30  while (true_dep[0] == '!') {
31  test_dep = !test_dep;
32  true_dep = true_dep.Substring (1);
33  }
34  if (package_list.IsAvailablePackage (true_dep) != test_dep) {
35  failed_dependencies.Add (dep);
36  }
37  }
38 
39  return failed_dependencies;
40  }
41 
42  public static List<string> Failed (Makefile makefile, PackageList package_list)
43  {
44  var failed_dependencies = new List<string> ();
45 
46  string[] dependencies = { };
47 
48  if (makefile.depend != null) {
49  String depend_attribute = makefile.depend;
50  dependencies = depend_attribute.Split (new char[] { ' ', ',' }, StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries);
51  }
52 
53  foreach (string dep in dependencies) {
54  string true_dep = dep;
55  bool test_dep = true;
56  while (true_dep[0] == '!') {
57  test_dep = !test_dep;
58  true_dep = true_dep.Substring (1);
59  }
60  if (package_list.IsAvailablePackage (true_dep) != test_dep) {
61  failed_dependencies.Add (dep);
62  }
63  }
64 
65  return failed_dependencies;
66  }
67  }
68 }
